Who we are

The best-kept secret on Žitná street

Lost & Found is a cocktail bar and hookah lounge just minutes from Wenceslas Square in the heart of Prague's Nové Město. We pour signature drinks you won't find anywhere else, keep the hookah premium and the lighting just right — the kind of spot you stumble into once and keep coming back to.

Come for after-work drinks, a date night, or the long weekend hours. Board games, darts, table football and our boxing machine keep the energy going. Rated 4.9★ across 935+ Google reviews — one of the highest-rated cocktail bars in Prague and a top-rated late-night destination in Nové Město.

Craft Cocktails Premium Hookah Craft Beer Board Games Darts & Football Event Spaces Late Night

What Sets Us Apart

Why Prague chooses Lost & Found

🍹 Signature Cocktails You Won't Find Anywhere Else

Our bartenders create exclusive signature cocktails that go beyond the classics. Drinks like Ferrari, Lamborghini, and Long Island are carefully crafted with premium spirits. Every guest is welcomed with genuine hospitality — our bartenders will gladly advise, recommend the perfect drink, or create a custom cocktail just for you.

🎡 Premium Hookah & Entertainment

Beyond cocktails, we offer premium hookah lounge with carefully selected blends (Tropical Mix, Berry Madness, Citrus Fresh) at 495 CZK. Enjoy free board games, darts, table football, and boxing machine. We host events and have dedicated spaces for private gatherings.

🍺 Craft Beer, Full Bar & Late Night

Curated selection of craft beers, premium spirits, wines, and alcohol-free options. We accept card and cash payments — full flexibility. Located on Žitná in Nové Město's center, we're open until 1:00 AM Wed–Thu and 3:00 AM Fri–Sat. The relaxed, welcoming atmosphere has no pretense — just genuine neon vibes.

4.9★ · 935+ Google reviews

What guests say

Real reviews from real guests — see why Lost & Found is Prague's top-rated cocktail bar

"The bartender made drinks to us based on our names! I specially recommend the apple whiskey sour. Do recommend!"

— Guest review

"Unbelievable range of cocktails, unbelievable service, great atmosphere and a great venue. Recommend to anybody visiting Prague."

— Seb, Google Review

"Creative house cocktails like the high-octane Ferrari, relaxed atmosphere with carefully curated mood lighting, friendly staff and genuine hospitality."
